title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Tama, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Unknown person #4 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A little girl gave them orders...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From above the stage on the live floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Somehow, she was able to sway them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She must have some kind of weird power!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: think we can stop it by killing her?!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: This is bad! They're targeting Tama!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Everything went just as planned, right, master?!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: I found Komachiyo collapsed back there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't have to worry though, leave him to us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No kidding... enemies one moment, friends the next...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, Nami, can I be your servant again?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Out of the way! Nami's partner coming through!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess she's not the only one who's amazing...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Help the Samuel bring down Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are you out of your mind!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Some subordinates are following the Headliners' lead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That makes two thousand additional traitors!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Their rampage has also cost us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a few more of the things you have ever seen.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The number of Beast pirate troops had already dwindled from 30,000 to 20,000...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you account for these new infections and casual- ties...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: could result in White's continued success.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Victor of this is of no consequence to us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We just need to confirm HIS death...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have we verified his identity? Even if it is him, any confidential information he has should be dated by now anyway.

dialogue.speaker: CP0
dialogue.text: His survival wouldn't harm the government.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 53 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
